materials.why_qcc_misses: The revised model raises tech-fit to 35%, cuts location to 15% and lifts cost to 20%, returning to 'quality first'. Pure QCC only looks at capital/age/geography — by that, LB (a giant listed firm) or Shanghai traders rank high, but what truly fits SABIC is the chlorination route: this model rewards pure chlorination/CR grades/import substitution and penalizes sulfate, putting CITIC Titanium a clear first. Chlorination cost doesn't depend on sulfur, so prices are stable and better for long-contract pricing. · 修正后体系把技术匹配度提到 35%、区位降到 15%、成本升到 20%，回归『质量优先』。纯企查查只看注册资本/年限/地理——按此龙佰（巨型上市）或上海贸易商会靠前，而真正适配 SABIC 的是氯化法技术路线：本评分对纯氯化法/CR 牌号/进口替代加分、对硫酸法扣分，中信钛业因此断层第一。氯化法成本不依赖硫磺，价格抗波动，亦更适合长协锁价。

conclusion.strategic: CITIC Titanium — pure chlorination 100% fits SABIC's premium plastics line; the Shanghai forward stock (Tianyi) solves logistics, full Middle-East export credentials, avoids sulfate's weatherability and solid-waste risks. · 中信钛业 —— 纯氯化法与 SABIC 高端塑料线 100% 适配，上海前置仓（天亿）解决物流短板，出口中东资质齐全，规避硫酸法耐候不足与固废风险。
conclusion.backup: LB Group large-capacity fallback; Pangang Vanadium-Titanium and Shanghai Yantai flexible top-up. · 龙佰集团大产能兜底；攀钢钒钛、上海颜钛灵活补单。
conclusion.risk: The lower list is pure-sulfate makers or small traders, only for low-end fillers, not for Saudi-export premium modified-plastics base material; Jiangxi Tianguang's status is doubtful, Dongjia/Lubei are name/entity corrections — verify before engaging. · 榜单后半段为纯硫酸法厂商或小型贸易商，仅适用低端填充料，禁止用于出口沙特高端改性塑料主料；江西添光经营状态存疑、东佳/鲁北为名称/主体修正项，合作前须核实。

materials.why_qcc_misses: After revision, tech-fit is 35%, location drops to 15%, cost 20%, plus capacity and financial-soundness weights. Pure business scoring would let large out-of-town listed groups beat Shanghai Bay Petrochemical; but FFS film hinges on 'in-house lines + filling-line fit + local Shanghai drayage', so this model gives bonuses for local in-house production, metallocene 3-layer co-extrusion and Saudi certification — putting Bay Petrochemical first. · 修正后技术匹配 35%、区位降至 15%、成本 20%，并新增产能与财务稳健权重。纯工商评分会让异地大型上市集团盖过上海海湾石化；但 FFS 膜的核心是『自产产线 + 灌装线适配 + 上海本地短驳』，本评分对上海本地自产、茂金属三层共挤、沙特认证专项加分，海湾石化因此第一。

conclusion.strategic: Shanghai Bay Petrochemical — a Shanghai 'little-giant' specialist, 12k-ton FFS-dedicated capacity, six world-class lines, 20 km to Jinshan port, same-day loading; won a CNOOC tender at lowest price (49.95M), cost proven. · 上海海湾石化 —— 上海本土专精特新，1.2 万吨 FFS 专用产能、六条国际一流产线，距金山港 20km 当日装箱，中海油招标最低价中标（4995 万元）成本已验证。
conclusion.backup: Nanjing Yangzi (FFS specialist leader, 20 European lines, ~60k t/yr), Zibo Jielin (heavy film/bags, leading 30k t/yr), and Nanjing Hujiang (BSE 'little-giant') serve as out-of-town large-capacity backups; Shanghai Zijiang Printing (listed flexible-packaging platform) can supply local bilingual labeling. · 南京扬子塑料化工（FFS 膜专业龙头，20 条欧洲产线、年产能近 6 万吨）、淄博洁林（重载膜袋 3 万吨/年规模领先）、南京沪江（北交所专精特新小巨人）作异地大产能备选；上海紫江彩印（上市软包装平台）可作上海本地双语标识配套。
conclusion.risk: Shanghai Zijiang Printing mainly does food/pharma/personal-care flexible packaging; FFS heavy-duty isn't its core, so it's ranked lower. Shanghai Sumei (sole proprietor) and Shanghai Liancheng (unclear info) aren't found on QCC, scale & credentials to verify — emergency top-up only. · 上海紫江彩印主营食品/医药/日化软包装，FFS 重载非主业，排名据此下调；上海塑美（个体户）、上海联诚（工商信息模糊）企查查未检索到工商主体，规模与资质待核实，仅作应急补单。

materials.why_qcc_misses: After revision, location weight drops sharply from 30% to 15%, quality rises to 30%, and capital & headcount hard thresholds are added to weed out '1-insured' micro firms. Pallets are a low-barrier industry; the old 30% location let small local plants win on location alone. Now suppliers must clear quality/cost/compliance/capacity together, with QCC headcount/capital cross-checks squeezing out shell entities. · 修正后区位权重从 30% 大幅降到 15%、品质升到 30%、并新增注册资本与参保硬门槛，淘汰『参保仅 1 人』式小微。木托盘是低门槛行业，旧版区位 30% 让本地小厂仅凭区位碾压；修正后须在品质/成本/合规/产能同时达标，并以企查查参保人数/注册资本交叉验证挤出空壳主体。

conclusion.strategic: Shanghai Minyue Packaging — QCC reg. capital is actually 15M (better than the reported 5M), Fengxian Jinhui pallet specialist, full IPPC credentials for export inspection, a quality local mid-size Shanghai pick. · 上海民悦包装 —— 注册资本企查查实为 1500 万元（优于报告 500 万），奉贤金汇镇专业托盘厂，IPPC 熏蒸资质齐全可办出口商检，上海本地中型优质选择。
conclusion.backup: Shanghai Hanchun (Songjiang, 5M) and Shanghai Panzhao (Songjiang) form dual coverage; out-of-town, two joint-stock plants meeting all hard thresholds — Anjie Packaging (Suzhou, 161 insured) and Wuxi Qiancheng (160 insured) — serve as peak-capacity and price-negotiation leverage, with Jiangsu Zhongnuo/Changlin pallets as backup. · 上海涵春（松江 500 万）、上海磐肇（松江）形成双区位覆盖；异地以安捷包装（苏州·参保 161 人）、无锡前程（参保 160 人）两家硬门槛全达标股份制规模厂作旺季产能与价格谈判杠杆，江苏中诺/长林托盘备选。
conclusion.risk: Many local firms are 500k-level micro with single-digit headcount; by the hard thresholds (capital <1M or insured <10 = veto) they only qualify for emergency top-up. Shanghai Qianhe is deregistered, Shanghai Changyu's entity is unverified, and Shanghai Saihuan/Shanghai Zhanguo Trading trigger the veto — not recommended as primary. Two firms topping the web 'Shanghai top-10 pallet makers' list — Shanghai Longzhan No.1 (actually hazwaste treatment/recycling on QCC) and Shanghai Dusen Wood (actually a hardware/packaging trader with no manufacturing license) — are not pallet makers on verification and have been removed. · 本地多家为 50 万级小微、参保个位数，按硬门槛（注册资本<100 万或参保<10 人一票否决）仅能定位应急补单；上海乾鹤已注销、上海昌誉工商主体待核实、上海赛环/上海占国工贸触发一票否决，不建议主供。网络『上海托盘十大厂家』榜单前列的上海龙展壹号（企查查实为危废治理/再生资源回收）、上海都森木业（实为五金/包装材料贸易商，无制造资质）经核验并非托盘制造企业，已剔除。
